projects.title: GitHub Issue Tracker
projects.description: Full-featured issue tracker using GitHub REST API. Features include real-time filtering, sorting, pagination with page caching, drag-and-drop Kanban board, and favorites system with localStorage persistence. Built with modern React patterns and TypeScript.

projects.title: TMDB Movie Search
projects.description: Movie and TV show discovery app with infinite scroll, virtual scrolling for performance, responsive grid layout, and real-time search. Integrated TMDB API with React Query caching. Features include filtering by media type, rating display, and detailed view for each title.

projects.title: E-Commerce Store
projects.description: Basic e-commerce platform with product catalog, shopping cart, and checkout page. Built as a learning project to understand React fundamentals. Features product filtering by category, quantity selection, and cart total calculation. [Legacy Project - Not Maintained]

projects.title: Tenant Website
projects.description: Property management platform for landlords and tenants. Features include tenant profiles, rent collection tracking, maintenance requests. [Ongoing]

about.title: About Me
about.description: Self-taught frontend developer with 2+ years of experience building web applications using modern technologies. Passionate about creating responsive, performant, and user-friendly interfaces with strong attention to detail.
